content.speakerText: I'll leave you to get settled — I'll be back in 10 minutes with the team.
content.speakerTextCn: 我先不打扰您了，10分钟后带团队回来。

options.text: Thanks so much — I really appreciate your help!
Why do you need to leave now?
Can you stay a little longer?

content.explanation: 正确答案表达了感谢，符合职场礼貌道别场景，能提升好感度。选项2虽然自然，但缺乏情感回应，显得冷淡；选项3和4带有质疑或请求，不符合对方主动退出的善意意图。

content.speakerText: If you need anything before we start — water, extra pens, etc. — just let me know.
content.speakerTextCn: 会议开始前若需要什么，比如水或笔，随时告诉我。

options.text: I'm all set, but thanks for asking!
You should have brought more pens.
Can you get me coffee too?

content.explanation: 正确答案既礼貌拒绝又表达感谢，符合自然、积极的沟通风格。选项2虽然语法正确，但语气生硬，缺少情感温度；选项3带有指责，不符合礼貌语境；选项4虽是合理请求，但未先确认是否需要，显得突兀。

content.speakerText: I'm heading out to grab a coffee before the meeting. Let me know if you need anything!
content.speakerTextCn: 我出去买杯咖啡，会议前如果有需要随时告诉我！

options.text: Thanks for offering — I’m good for now, but I’ll reach out if I need help.
Can you get me a latte?

content.explanation: 正确答案既礼貌回应对方好意，又保持开放沟通，体现专业与温暖。选项1语气冷漠，缺乏感谢；选项3负面且不相关；选项4直接提需求，未先表达感谢，显得冒失。

content.template: I'll leave you to get settled — I'll be back in 10 minutes with the team. Thanks so much — I really ___ your help!
content.hint: 表达感谢时常用的核心动词

content.template: I'm all set, but ___ for asking!
content.hint: 礼貌回应对方关心时的常用短语
content.knowledgePoint: 固定表达：thanks for asking（礼貌感谢式回应）

content.template: Before you go, just ___ me know if you need any support later.
content.hint: 表达‘随时告诉我’的常用动词搭配
content.knowledgePoint: 动词搭配：let me know（主动提供支持的核心句型）

content.speakerText: I'll leave you to get settled — I'll be back in 10 minutes with the team.
content.speakerTextCn: 我先不打扰您了，10分钟后带团队回来。
expectedAnswers: Thanks so much — I really appreciate your help!
Got it, I’ll be ready when you get back.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否表达了理解和感谢，而非忽视或质疑
语言准确性：语法正确，无明显错误
表达自然度：是否符合职场日常口语习惯
关键词覆盖：是否包含 appreciate / thanks / no worries 等礼貌表达

content.speakerText: If you need anything before we start — water, extra pens, etc. — just let me know.
content.speakerTextCn: 会议开始前若需要什么，比如水或笔，随时告诉我。
expectedAnswers: I'm all set, but thanks for asking!
Actually, could I get a glass of water? Thanks!
Okay, will do — I’ll let you know if anything comes up.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否恰当回应了支持提议，或自然提出需求
语言准确性：语法和用词正确，无中式英语
表达自然度：语气是否轻松、礼貌、不生硬
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 thanks for asking / let you know / actually 等自然表达

content.speakerText: I’m going to grab a quick coffee — feel free to reach out if you need anything before the meeting starts.
content.speakerTextCn: 我去买杯咖啡，会议开始前如果需要什么，随时联系我。
expectedAnswers: Thanks for checking in — I’m all set for now!
I appreciate that! I’ll let you know if I need help.
Great, thanks! I might ask for a pen later — no rush.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否礼貌接受支持提议，或温和提出需求
语言准确性：使用了恰当的连接词和动词搭配
表达自然度：是否像母语者一样轻松、真诚
关键词覆盖：是否包含 thanks / appreciate / let you know / feel free 等礼貌表达
